mentions.note: Cramer favorite; only healthcare bright spot for months; healthcare sector now broadening beyond just Lilly.

Core holding 5+ years, up 360%+. Retatrutide phase 3 data (70 lb weight loss) superior to current GLP-1s; VERVE-102 gene therapy shows 62% LDL reduction with single infusion. Three vaccine acquisitions diversify beyond GLP-1. CVS Caremark deal expands access ($25–50/month). Revenue/EPS CAGR 25%+ continues; secular growth play insulated from macro turmoil.
Multiple GLP-1 formulations including novel muscle-sparing candidate; knockout punch vs. Novo Nordisk if approved. Healthcare sector contrarian pick.

Only healthcare company with trillion-dollar valuation; GLP-1 drugs (diabetes, weight loss) huge growth; new weight loss drug retatrutide showed strong phase-3 data (busts fat not muscle); separate gene therapy for cholesterol reduction shows great data; brilliant management continues to deliver.
Pharma winner today; among sectors benefiting from rotation out of overheated data center names; healthcare sector solid.
Cramer did extensive late-night work; ready to roll; bull market for Lilly; willing to sit down with company; very strong conviction.
